latest_news.headline: Trump: 'No ceasefire' with Iran - 'you don't ceasefire when obliterating'
latest_news.text: Trump explicitly rules out ceasefire: 'You don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' Contradicts earlier 'winding down' rhetoric. Major hawkish pivot.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 06. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric (no ceasefire), US eases oil sanctions, Iran selectively opens Hormuz for Japan, oil at $107 (down from $119). ESCALATION: Fresh Tehran + Beirut strikes, 20 killed Lebanon, medical workers killed, UK base access expanded, Iran warns British lives, 20+ Saudi drones intercepted overnight, ground invasion rhetoric continues, Hormuz still effectively closed. NET: Military operations intensifying despite diplomatic off-ramp signals.

latest_news.headline: US-Israel STRIKE Natanz nuclear enrichment facility
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Times of Israel / Hindustan Times
latest_news.text: US-Israeli air raid targets Iran's Natanz nuclear enrichment facility. Iran state media reports 'no leakage of radioactive materials', residents not at risk. Second major nuclear site struck after Bushehr. Physical destruction of enrichment capability now confirmed.

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims 70th wave of strikes on US bases across region
latest_news.text: IRGC claims its 70th wave of retaliatory strikes on US military bases across the Middle East. Sustained Iranian bombardment continues despite leadership decapitation.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes ignite massive fire near US military complex in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Drone strikes ignite massive fire near US military complex in Baghdad. Iraqi intelligence HQ also hit. Residential neighborhood struck. Iran-backed militia escalation in Iraq continues.

latest_news.headline: Basij deputy commander killed in Tehran strike alongside chief
latest_news.text: Basij deputy commander Azim Esmaili killed in Tehran airstrike alongside chief. Continued decapitation of Iran's internal security apparatus.

latest_news.headline: Iraq declares force majeure on foreign-run oilfields
latest_news.text: Iraq declares force majeure on foreign-run oilfields amid Strait of Hormuz disruptions. Economic contagion from Iran war spreads to Iraqi oil sector.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 10:04 UTC) - Day 21 of Iran war. MAJOR ESCALATION: US-Israel strikes Natanz nuclear facility (2nd nuclear site after Bushehr). IRGC claims 70th wave of retaliatory strikes. Drone fire near US Baghdad complex. Basij deputy killed in Tehran. Iraq declares force majeure on foreign oilfields. Oil highest since 2022. Saudi intercepts 8 drones overnight. Israel-Beirut strikes continue. Updated 2026-03-21T10:04:00Z
